name: Circle Community API
description: Circle is a community platform. The API provides endpoints to manage communities, spaces, members, posts, comments, and events. Authentication uses an API token passed as a query parameter or Bearer token. Note: The Circle API documentation is JS-rendered and was not fully accessible; this spec is based on the known Circle v1 admin API.
